subject: [PATCH pynfs 12/13] server41tests: support a second server for inter-server copy

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds support for a second server in inter-server copy tests by introducing an optional --server2 option that allows specifying the URL of the second server and its path. The test environment is updated to create, initialize, and clean up both servers, and credential creation is factored into a helper function to ensure consistency between clients. This change enables single-server runs to remain unaffected when the --server2 option is not used.
